subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God, Thou beholdest me amidst the rebellious among Thy creatures and the tyrannous among Thy servants, and the matter hath grown severe upon me in Thy love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل اللهم یا الهی ترانی بین عصاه خلقک و طغاه عبادک و اشتد علی الامر فی حبک علی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
